title: WGS84 FAIL: QN (2,1,3,4) does NOT match WGS84 — axis ratio 0.943 vs 0.997
_fixture_purpose: FAIL fixture demonstrating that an arbitrary QN (2,1,3,4) does NOT match WGS84. The axis ratio sqrt(ab)/d=sqrt(8)/3=0.943 is far from WGS84's 0.997. Eccentricity e/d=1/3=0.333 is 4x too large. This fixture validates the fail detection path.
